name: magpie
description: Karolin − a small person dressed in a magpie tail and top hat, riding on a shrew;

name: loincloths
description: Les Nèg'marrons − groups of men dressed in red loincloths, bearing ripe tomatoes in their mouths while their bodies are smeared with grease or molasses. They deliberately try to come in contact with spectators, soiling their clothes;

name: cross-dressing
description: Les makoumés − cross-dressing men (out of the Carnival context, makoumé is a pejorative term for a homosexual);

name: leotard
description: Soussouris (the bat) − a character dressed in a winged leotard from head to foot, usually black in colour. Traditionally malevolent, this character is liable to chase spectators and "sting" them.

name: Giampaolo di Cocco
